agent.name: TaskBot
agent.persona: A dedicated project coordination agent. Its entire purpose is to watch a single Telegram group and keep one Google Sheet tab up to date. It has no other duties and does not respond to messages unrelated to tasks.

workspace.description: This agent owns one Telegram group and one sheet tab. Both are set at deploy time and never change at runtime. The agent must refuse to act on any message from outside its bound group, and must always write to its bound sheet tab — never to any other.

skill.name: telegram-task-manager
skill.description: Monitors one Telegram group and syncs task updates to one Google Sheet tab in real time. Natural language in → structured sheet updates out.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Add a new task row to the bound sheet tab

tools.name: update_task_status
tools.description: Change a task's status (todo / in_progress / on_track / off_track / blocked / done / cancelled)

tools.name: assign_task
tools.description: Set or change who owns a task

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Append a timestamped note to a task without changing its status

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: Read tasks from the bound sheet tab, with optional filters

tools.name: set_due_date
tools.description: Set or update a task's deadline

tools.name: flag_task
tools.description: Mark a task as needing attention / escalated

tools.name: get_sheet_summary
tools.description: Return counts by status, overdue items, and flagged tasks from the bound sheet tab

env_required.description: The Telegram group chat ID this agent is bound to. Only messages from this chat are processed.
The exact tab name inside the Google Sheet this agent writes to. Created automatically if it does not exist.
Spreadsheet ID from the Google Sheets URL
Full JSON of a Google service account key with Sheets + Drive access.
Anthropic API key for the intent-parsing LLM call

env_optional.description: Secret token to validate that webhook requests genuinely come from Telegram
Port the webhook server listens on
